Package org.apache.juneau.petstore.service

Class PetStore

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.petstore.service.PetStore
public class PetStore extends Object
In-memory Pet/Order/User store seeded from classpath JSON.

Backed by ConcurrentHashMaps; pet and order IDs auto-assign via AtomicLong starting from the highest seeded ID plus one (or 1 if no seeds existed). Seed files live on the classpath at petstore/init/{Pets,Orders,Users}.json and are loaded lazily on first access.

This is a sample/demo store — there is no persistence, no transactions, and no replication. Restart wipes state back to the seeded baseline.

See Also:
  • juneau-petstore

  • Constructor Details

    • PetStore

      public PetStore()
      Constructor.

      Eagerly loads the bundled classpath seed data.

  • Method Details

    • getPets

      public Collection<Pet> getPets()
      Returns all pets.
      Returns:
      All pets, in arbitrary order. Never null.

    • getPet

      public Pet getPet(long id)
      Returns a pet by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The pet ID.
      Returns:
      The pet, or null if not found.

    • createPet

      public Pet createPet(Pet pet)
      Creates a new pet.

      Assigns the next available ID, ignoring any caller-supplied ID.

      Parameters:
      pet - The pet to create. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      The created pet (same instance, with assigned ID).

    • updatePet

      public Pet updatePet(Pet pet)
      Updates an existing pet.
      Parameters:
      pet - The pet to update. Must not be null; must carry an ID matching an existing pet.
      Returns:
      The updated pet.
      Throws:
      PetstoreNotFoundException - If no pet with the given ID exists.

    • deletePet

      public void deletePet(long id)
      Deletes a pet by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The pet ID.
      Throws:
      PetstoreNotFoundException - If no pet with the given ID exists.

    • getOrders

      public Collection<Order> getOrders()
      Returns all orders.
      Returns:
      All orders, in arbitrary order. Never null.

    • getOrder

      public Order getOrder(long id)
      Returns an order by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The order ID.
      Returns:
      The order, or null if not found.

    • createOrder

      public Order createOrder(Order order)
      Creates a new order.

      Assigns the next available ID, ignoring any caller-supplied ID.

      Parameters:
      order - The order to create. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      The created order (same instance, with assigned ID).

    • updateOrder

      public Order updateOrder(Order order)
      Updates an existing order.
      Parameters:
      order - The order to update. Must not be null; must carry an ID matching an existing order.
      Returns:
      The updated order.
      Throws:
      PetstoreNotFoundException - If no order with the given ID exists.

    • deleteOrder

      public void deleteOrder(long id)
      Deletes an order by ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The order ID.
      Throws:
      PetstoreNotFoundException - If no order with the given ID exists.

    • getUsers

      public Collection<User> getUsers()
      Returns all users.
      Returns:
      All users, in arbitrary order. Never null.

    • getUser

      public User getUser(String username)
      Returns a user by username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username (primary key).
      Returns:
      The user, or null if not found.

    • createUser

      public User createUser(User user)
      Creates a new user.
      Parameters:
      user - The user to create. Must not be null; must carry a non-null username not already in use.
      Returns:
      The created user.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the username is already in use.

    • updateUser

      public User updateUser(User user)
      Updates an existing user.
      Parameters:
      user - The user to update. Must not be null; must carry a username matching an existing user.
      Returns:
      The updated user.
      Throws:
      PetstoreNotFoundException - If no user with the given username exists.

    • deleteUser

      public void deleteUser(String username)
      Deletes a user by username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username.
      Throws:
      PetstoreNotFoundException - If no user with the given username exists.
